key.name: model-path
key.summary: Path to the GGUF model file used for local transcription
key.description: Absolute path to a Whisper-compatible GGUF model. When empty, Kaki scans ~/.local/share/kaki/models/ for the first *.gguf at startup.

key.name: use-streaming
key.description: When true and the loaded model supports streaming, partial transcripts are emitted while speaking. When false, the whole clip is transcribed after stop.

key.name: language
key.description: ISO-639-1 language code passed to the transcribe runtime, or "auto" to let the model detect the language.

key.name: cpu-threads
key.summary: Number of CPU threads for the transcribe.cpp runtime
key.description: Thread count passed to SessionParams.n_threads. Ignored on GPU backends that don't use CPU threads.

key.name: dictation-auto-type
key.summary: Auto-type streamed text into focused window during dictation
key.description: When true, the streamed transcript is injected via the keystroke backend into whatever window has keyboard focus while Kaki is minimized. When false, dictation records and transcribes but does not inject keystrokes.

key.name: dictation-key-delay-ms
key.summary: Delay between keystrokes when simulating typing (ms)
key.description: Passed to ydotool (--key-delay) or xdotool (--delay). Ignored by the libei backend, which injects events directly.

key.name: dictation-trailing-newline
key.summary: Append a newline after each dictation session
key.description: When true, a newline is typed after the final transcript of each dictation session. Useful when dictating into a chat composer that sends on Enter.

key.name: keystroke-backend
key.description: Forces a specific backend. "auto" picks libei (if built with support) then ydotool then xdotool based on availability and session type.
